name: @tetherto/mdk
description: MDK umbrella repository - thin federated root orchestrator. Forwards install/build/test/lint/typecheck to the UI npm workspace (ui/) and the federated backend (backend/core, backend/workers). No shared dependency graph, no root workspaces, no Turbo - each domain keeps its own package manager and install scripts.
author: Tether

scripts.setup: npm run setup:ui && npm run setup:core && npm run setup:workers
scripts.ci: npm run ci:ui && npm run ci:core && npm run ci:workers
scripts.build: npm run build:ui && npm run build:core && npm run build:workers
scripts.test: npm run test:ui && npm run test:core && npm run test:workers
scripts.lint: npm run lint:ui && npm run lint:core && npm run lint:workers
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix:ui && npm run lint:fix:core && npm run lint:fix:workers
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:ui && npm run typecheck:core && npm run typecheck:workers
scripts.clean: npm run clean:ui && npm run clean:core && npm run clean:workers
